blocked_reason: ExecuTorch elizanpu backend requires IREE elizanpu build per compiler/iree-eliza-npu/iree-pin.json; v1.2.0 unblocks upstream feature gaps (Cortex-M / CMSIS-NN template, CSE pass, Ethos-U Vela 5.0.0) but the elizanpu HAL target still ships only from our IREE pin.
bump_rationale: Cortex-M first-class backend with CMSIS-NN — closest upstream analog to elizanpu; serves as a template for the ElizaBackend preprocessor and partitioner integration.
CSE (common subexpression elimination) export pass available at AOT — reduces graph size before partitioning.
ARM Ethos-U SDK 26.02 + Vela 5.0.0 — proves the embedded-NPU partition + delegate pattern at production quality.
Vulkan int8 quantized — second open backend (besides XNNPACK) supporting our int8 op set; useful as a CPU-fallback cross-check.
LoRA + MultimethodLoraConfig — multi-method PTE export needed for our adapter-swap inference path.
Watch upstream: PR #19617 (RISC-V test matrix in CI), PR #18863 (Nordic AXON NPU draft — closest external analog to elizanpu, useful precedent for our delegate register-and-partition flow).

deprecations_observed.mps_backend: Apple MPS backend marked deprecated in v1.2.0 README. Repo grep on 2026-05-20 confirms no chip-package code path depends on executorch MPS / torch.backends.mps; only research/landscape docs mention it. No action required.
